---
name: Feature Request / Skill Idea
about: Suggest a new skill or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

What do you want Home PiPi to do?

## Use Case

Why is this useful? Who benefits?

## Proposed Approach

If you have ideas on implementation, describe them here.
Remember: new capabilities should be **skills** (`src/skills/*.skill.ts`), not core changes.

## Hardware Requirements

Does this need additional hardware? (sensors, relays, cameras, etc.)
